case_title: ACCESS SCAFFOLDING CO. VS WILLIAMS CONSTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ACCESS SCAFFOLDING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS CONSTRUCTION PATCO INVESTMENTS, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACCESS SCAFFOLDING CO.
